verses.text: What is the vine more than any tree? Its wood is useless for work or even a peg. Fruitless privilege. Israel was chosen to bear fruit, not to boast of being a vine.
What is the vine more than any tree? Its wood is useless for work or even a peg. Fruitless privilege. Israel was chosen to bear fruit, not to boast of being a vine.
What is the vine more than any tree? Its wood is useless for work or even a peg. Fruitless privilege. Israel was chosen to bear fruit, not to boast of being a vine.
Cast into the fire it is fuel; useless whole, how much less when charred? Doubly worthless. A people who fail their calling and are then judged have nothing left to offer.
Cast into the fire it is fuel; useless whole, how much less when charred? Doubly worthless. A people who fail their calling and are then judged have nothing left to offer.
So God gives up the inhabitants of Jerusalem; though escaped from one fire, another shall devour them, and the land be desolate. Judgment upon judgment. The fruitless vine is fit only for burning.
So God gives up the inhabitants of Jerusalem; though escaped from one fire, another shall devour them, and the land be desolate. Judgment upon judgment. The fruitless vine is fit only for burning.
